name: perform-nav-zoned
note: S-PERFORM-ZONE (operator UAT 2026-07-17: 'make it easy for single hand usage while performing without having to pick a button in the middle'). In the fullscreen perform view the ADVANCE control (Next / finish) is the one button tapped constantly mid-song, so it must be the DOMINANT bottom-right thumb target, not an equal half. Assert #pNext is >= 2x the width of #pPrev. Setup: seed a saved custom song with a sheet, open it, tap the Stage button (#stageBtn) to enter the perform view. Red-first: pre-fix the two nav buttons were equal (flex:1 each) so the ratio assert FAILS.

steps.label: seed a saved custom song with a two-section sheet so the perform view has content
steps.js: (function(){try{localStorage.setItem('roadcase-ukulele-gcea.custom.v1', JSON.stringify([{id:'perfZoneSong', t:'Perform Zone Song', a:'Me', y:2026, d:'Mine', custom:true, seq:['C','G','Am','F'], sheet:[['Verse','[C] a [G] b [Am] c [F] d'],['Chorus','[C] e [G] f [Am] g [F] h']]}]));return true}catch(e){return false}})()

steps.label: Next is the dominant bottom-right target: at least 2x the width of Prev (FAILS on the pre-fix equal-halves layout)
Next sits on the right of Prev (bottom-right thumb arc)
